### HONGYI

cmake .. ^
-G"Visual Studio 15 2017 Win64" ^
-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release ^
-DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX="C:/Libraries/OpenGL/glui-master/build-shayan/install" ^
-DGLUT_glut_LIBRARY="C:/Libraries/OpenGL/freeglut/lib/x64/freeglut.lib" ^
-DGLUT_INCLUDE_DIR="C:/Libraries/OpenGL/freeglut/include/GL" ^
-DGLUT_FOUND=TRUE 


### SHAYAN
# Download FREEGLUT from 

# Release

cmake .. ^
-G"Visual Studio 15 2017 Win64" ^
-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release ^
-DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX="C:/Libraries/OpenGL/glui-master/build-shayan/install" ^
-DGLUT_glut_LIBRARY="C:/Libraries/OpenGL/freeglut/lib/x64/freeglut.lib" ^
-DGLUT_INCLUDE_DIR="C:/Libraries/OpenGL/freeglut/include/GL" ^
-DGLUT_FOUND=TRUE 



# Debug

cmake .. ^
-G"Visual Studio 15 2017 Win64" \
-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug \
-DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX="/d/Libraries/glui/Debug" ^
-DGLUT_glut_LIBRARY="C:/Libraries/OpenGL/freeglut/lib/x64/freeglut.lib" ^
-DGLUT_INCLUDE_DIR="C:/Libraries/OpenGL/freeglut/include/GL" ^
-DGLUT_FOUND=TRUE
